name: Pesto Trapanese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mortar, pound the garlic, salt, and basil until they form a paste.
2. Gradually add the chopped almonds, then the diced tomatoes.
3. Reduce all ingredients to a pulp using either a mortar or an electric blender. If using a blender, add the olive oil first.
4. Season with black pepper to taste.
5. Cook the spaghetti in boiling salted water until al dente, then drain.
6. Toss the cooked pasta with the pesto sauce until evenly distributed.
7. Serve immediately.
